parameters.query: SELECT d.id, d.doc_type, d.doc_number, d.sap_doc_num, COALESCE(NULLIF(d.warehouse_code, ''), MAX(dl.warehouse_code)) AS warehouse_code, d.business_partner, d.bp_name, d.doc_date, d.status, d.wms_status, d.created_at, d.created_by, d.exported_at, COUNT(dl.id) AS line_count, COALESCE(SUM(dl.actual_qty), 0) AS total_qty, COALESCE(SUM(dl.actual_qty), 0) AS total_actual FROM wms.wms_documents d LEFT JOIN wms.wms_document_lines dl ON d.id = dl.document_id WHERE d.company_code = $1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM wms.wms_transactions tx WHERE tx.document_id = d.id) AND ($2 = '' OR d.doc_type = $2) AND (($3 = 'pending_export' AND d.wms_status NOT IN ('completed','exported')) OR ($3 != 'pending_export' AND ($3 = '' OR d.wms_status = $3))) AND ($4 = '' OR d.doc_date >= NULLIF($4, '')::date) AND ($5 = '' OR d.doc_date <= NULLIF($5, '')::date) GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY d.created_at DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT d.*, dl.id AS line_id, dl.line_num, dl.item_code, dl.item_name, dl.uom, dl.planned_qty, dl.actual_qty, dl.warehouse_code AS line_whs, dl.bin_location, dl.from_warehouse, dl.from_bin, dl.to_warehouse, dl.to_bin, dl.status AS line_status, dl.wms_status AS line_wms_status FROM wms.wms_documents d LEFT JOIN wms.wms_document_lines dl ON d.id = dl.document_id WHERE d.company_code = $1 AND (d.doc_number = $2 OR d.id::text = $2) AND ($3 = '' OR d.doc_type = $3) ORDER BY dl.line_num

SELECT t.id, t.action, t.item_code, t.quantity, t.warehouse_code, t.bin_location, t.from_bin, t.performed_by, t.remarks, t.transaction_time, t.scanned_barcode, dl.item_name FROM wms.wms_transactions t JOIN wms.wms_documents d ON t.document_id = d.id LEFT JOIN wms.wms_document_lines dl ON t.line_id = dl.id WHERE d.company_code = $1 AND (d.doc_number = $2 OR d.id::text = $2) AND ($3 = '' OR d.doc_type = $3) ORDER BY t.transaction_time DESC
